heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 16013 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this subtitle and the amendments made by this subtitle.
notes: References in TextThis subtitle, referred to in text, is subtitle B (§§ 621–639) of title VI of , , , which enacted this part and sections 2015b, 2210c, and 5853 of this title, amended sections 2133, 2135, 2158, 2160d, 2201, 2210a, 2214, 2297h–8, and 5851 of this title, repealed , and enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 2158 and 2214 of this title. For complete classification of this subtitle to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 109–58119 Stat. 782section 2213 of this titleAug. 8, 2005
amendments: References in TextThis subtitle, referred to in text, is subtitle B (§§ 621–639) of title VI of , , , which enacted this part and sections 2015b, 2210c, and 5853 of this title, amended sections 2133, 2135, 2158, 2160d, 2201, 2210a, 2214, 2297h–8, and 5851 of this title, repealed , and enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 2158 and 2214 of this title. For complete classification of this subtitle to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 109–58119 Stat. 782section 2213 of this titleAug. 8, 2005
